name: Hongfa Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Hongfa Technology Co., Ltd. manufactures and supplies relays, low-voltage devices, contactors, precise components, automatic production lines, etc. It offers a range of relays, including signal relays, automotive relays and modules, power relays, industrial relays, latching relays, solid-state relays and power modules, and hermetically-sealed relays, as well as relay sockets. The company's low-voltage devices comprise intelligent air circuit breakers, molded case circuit breakers, automatic transfer switching, and terminal circuit breakers. It serves customers worldwide. Hongfa Technology Co., Ltd. was formerly known as WuHan LiNuo Solar Energy Group Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Hongfa Technology Co., Ltd. in December 2012. The company was founded in 1984 and is based in Xiamen, China.
